title: Poetic Product Description
scenario: Create a poetic product description for a new eco-friendly water bottle that is both stylish and sustainable. The description should be 50 words or less and must use at least three metaphors. Target is to evoke a sense of luxury and exclusivity.
constraints: Must use at least three metaphors

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated text is under 50 words and uses at least three metaphors.
Assess if the tone of the description is luxurious and exclusive.
Evaluate the uniqueness and creativity of the metaphors used.
